title: Between Heaven and Earth
writer: Salah Abouseif, El Sayed Bedeir, Naguib Mahfouz
actors: Hind Rustum, Abdulsalam El-Nabulsi, Abdel Moneim Ibrahim
plot: The film revolves around a group of people stuck in the elevator are waiting for the help, but they discovered that the group include a thief and a crazy man.
